current_capability.software_claim: MMIO scalar, packed-dot, packed ReLU, bounded scratchpad VRELU/GEMM, single-matmul/FP8-matmul/Conv2D/attention-QK/attention-AV/MLP/SwiGLU/residual-add/bias-add/single-head-transformer-block/modern-decoder-block lowering smoke, and local descriptor-driven DRAM-to-scratchpad tensor prefetch prototype only

register_followups.claim_boundary: BSP header parity is tracked here so the contract surfaces the gap without unblocking downstream consumers

perf_counters_added.claim_boundary: RTL counters landed at the offsets recorded below; BSP header parity is tracked separately in mmio.register_followups

entries.name: PERF_STALL_CYCLES
entries.description: Cycles the descriptor engine spent in an AXI memory-wait state (descriptor fetch, tensor stream, or writeback) regardless of handshake completion; provides a power-per-counter proxy for memory-bound stalls at L1/L2

entries.name: PERF_SCRATCH_BYTES
entries.description: Total scratchpad bytes accessed (read plus write) by accepted GEMM/VRELU/stream/writeback paths; complements DESC_BYTES_READ/DESC_BYTES_WRITTEN by exposing on-die SRAM bandwidth used by the datapath

entries.name: PERF_THERMAL_THROTTLE
entries.description: Host-writable shadow latch that increments on every MMIO write; simulation-only proxy for a future thermal HAL that will drive the counter from platform telemetry. Cleared with the PERF_ERRORS write-clear together with the other perf counters

stablehlo_subset_import.validation: StableHLO subset parser accepts stablehlo.dot_general and stablehlo.dot rank-2 records for every bounded low-precision matmul smoke precision, stablehlo.batch_matmul rank-4 [B,H,M,K]x[B,H,K,N] records for INT8/INT4, batch-1 NHWC/HWIO stablehlo.convolution records for INT8/INT4, stablehlo.add/stablehlo.residual_add/stablehlo.bias_add INT8 matrix records, bounded stablehlo.mlp INT8 ReLU records, and bounded rank-4 stablehlo.attention_qk/stablehlo.attention_av INT8/INT4 records that dispatch through lower_attention_qk_smoke/lower_attention_av_smoke. It validates M/N/K against the local 3x3x7 tile envelope, rejects empty modules, duplicate op names, shape mismatches, unsupported layouts, unsupported activation, unsupported add/bias/attention shapes, and unsupported precision before lowering, emits parser-only LoweringPlan records mapping each precision/op to the existing runtime_api/schema smoke target, materializes only those checked runtime smoke graph records from required tensor fields and static op attributes, and dispatches materialized modules through lower_stablehlo_module_smoke with dispatch_order/lowering_plans metadata and without CPU fallback for covered smoke ops

ternary.reserved_encoding_behavior: any 0b11 in OP_A or OP_B fails closed: CTRL_STATUS.error set, PERF_ERRORS incremented, RESULT/RESULT_HI unchanged

matmul_lowering_smoke.tiled_dispatch: M/N/K dimensions may be split into multiple current GEMM commands; host code stitches complete output tiles and accumulates int32 split-K partial outputs but does not perform MAC fallback
matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No graph partitioning, StableHLO/FlatBuffer parser, quantization calibration, hardware scheduler, CPU fallback planner, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

sparse_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: dense signed INT4 activation matrix plus per-8-K-block 2:4 sparse INT4 weight values and metadata positions
sparse_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates signed INT4 activations, four nonzero weights and two distinct metadata positions per 2:4 group, pads K to 8-lane sparse blocks with INT4 zero values when needed, dispatches each sparse block through SDOT4_S4_2_4, and accumulates sparse block partial sums through OP_ADD
sparse_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No sparse tensor GEMM, sparse tensor-core throughput, hardware metadata scheduler, pruning/calibration flow, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

group_scaled_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: signed INT8 activation matrix, signed INT4 weight matrix, and per-K-group per-output-column signed Q8.8 scale matrix
group_scaled_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates signed INT8 activations, signed INT4 weights, positive group_size, and signed Q8.8 per-group scales, dispatches each activation-weight scalar product through MUL_LO and ADD, then applies every group scale through MUL_LO and accumulates scaled Q8.8 group contributions through ADD
group_scaled_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No GEMM_S4_GS32/GEMM_S4_GS64/GEMM_S4_GS128 RTL opcode, tensor group-scaled INT4 GEMM, BF16 scale decode, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

int2_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: signed INT2 matrices in the two's-complement range [-2, 1] with signed int32 accumulator output
int2_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates signed INT2 matrices, pads K to DOT16 width with INT2 zero values when needed, and dispatches every sixteen-lane INT2 MAC chunk through DOT16_S2 with signed int32 accumulation
int2_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No tensor INT2 GEMM, BitNet production kernel, sparsity-aware INT2 tensor path, graph partitioning, quantization calibration, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

fp8_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: raw FP8 E4M3 byte matrices with signed Q8.8 accumulator output
fp8_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates raw FP8 byte matrices, pads K to DOT4 width with FP8 zero bytes when needed, and dispatches every four-lane FP8 MAC chunk through DOT4_FP8_E4M3 with signed Q8.8 accumulation
fp8_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No tensor FP8 GEMM, FP8 systolic path, FP16/BF16 accumulation, graph partitioning, quantization calibration, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

fp16_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: raw IEEE FP16 finite normal/zero matrices converted by host to signed Q8.8 matrices with signed Q8.8 accumulator output
fp16_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates raw FP16 16-bit matrices, rejects NaN/Inf/subnormal values, converts finite normal/zero values to signed Q8.8, dispatches every scalar product through MUL_LO, host requantizes each Q16.16 product back to Q8.8, and dispatches accumulation through ADD
fp16_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No tensor FP16 GEMM, FP16 systolic path, FP16 accumulator, graph partitioning, quantization calibration, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

bf16_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: raw BF16 finite normal/zero matrices converted by host to signed Q8.8 matrices with signed Q8.8 accumulator output
bf16_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates raw BF16 16-bit matrices, rejects NaN/Inf/subnormal values, converts finite normal/zero values to signed Q8.8, dispatches every scalar product through MUL_LO, host requantizes each Q16.16 product back to Q8.8, and dispatches accumulation through ADD
bf16_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No tensor BF16 GEMM, BF16 systolic path, BF16 accumulator, graph partitioning, quantization calibration, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

conv2d_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host materializes im2col and filter matrices, then reuses lower_matmul_smoke so current GEMM_S8/GEMM_S4 commands perform every convolution MAC
conv2d_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No general convolution lowering, SAME padding, strided/dilated convolution, grouped/depthwise convolution, graph partitioning, hardware scheduler, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

depthwise_conv2d_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host iterates output pixels, channels, and depth multipliers directly without im2col, dispatching every depthwise MAC through scalar OP_MUL_LO and OP_ADD
depthwise_conv2d_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector depthwise datapath, grouped convolution, SAME padding, strided/dilated depthwise convolution, fused activation, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

grouped_conv2d_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host iterates output pixels, groups, group-local input channels, and group-local output channels directly without im2col, dispatching every grouped convolution MAC through scalar OP_MUL_LO and OP_ADD
grouped_conv2d_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector grouped-convolution datapath, depthwise convolution fallback, SAME padding, strided/dilated grouped convolution, fused activation, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

attention_qk_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host iterates batch/head dimensions and transposes each key matrix, then reuses lower_matmul_smoke so current GEMM_S8/GEMM_S4 commands perform every QK score MAC
attention_qk_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No softmax, scaling, masking, value projection, KV-cache paging, fused attention kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

attention_softmax_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 [batch][heads][tokens][key_tokens] int8 logits plus optional boolean mask
attention_softmax_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates shape, mask, and bounded logit spread before dispatch; NPU scalar MAX_U32 over biased int8 values finds row max, OP_SUB forms deltas, EXP2_NEG_Q0_8 computes power-of-two Q0.8 exponent approximations, and OP_ADD accumulates row sums; host applies mask and divides by row sum to produce Q0.8 attention weights
attention_softmax_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact exp/e softmax, hardware reciprocal/divider, vector softmax datapath, scale fusion, causal-mask hardware, fused attention kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

attention_av_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 [batch][heads][tokens][key_tokens] attention weights and [batch][heads][key_tokens][value_dim] value tensors
attention_av_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host iterates batch/head dimensions and requires prequantized attention weights, then reuses lower_matmul_smoke so current GEMM_S8/GEMM_S4 commands perform every AV context MAC
attention_av_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No softmax, scaling, masking, score normalization, KV-cache paging, fused attention kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

attention_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 [batch][heads][tokens][head_dim] query/key tensors plus [batch][heads][key_tokens][value_dim] value tensors and optional boolean mask
attention_lowering_smoke.lowering: Composes lower_attention_qk_smoke, host QK-score requantization, optional host-generated causal or sliding_window mask_mode, lower_attention_softmax_smoke, host Q0.8 attention-weight requantization, lower_attention_av_smoke, and host context requantization across batch/head slices
attention_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No fused flash attention kernel, exact exp/e softmax, scale fusion, sliding-window sparse attention hardware, KV-cache paging/update, graph partitioning, Android delegate, production compiler backend, or sustained transformer decode performance is implemented

kv_cache_update_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 [batch][heads][capacity][dim] key/value caches plus rank-4 new key/value tensors and per-head cache lengths
kv_cache_update_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates cache capacity and append lengths, preserves existing cache entries, dispatches each appended K/V scalar copy through OP_ADD(value, 0), writes appended tokens into fixed cache positions, and advances cache_lengths
kv_cache_update_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No paged KV cache, cache eviction, circular buffer, DMA-backed cache update, multi-batch decode cache manager, Android delegate, graph compiler, or production compiler backend is implemented

qkv_projection_lowering_smoke.layout: signed INT8 input matrix plus packed signed INT8 [Q|K|V] projection weight matrix with equal Q/K/V output widths
qkv_projection_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates packed QKV projection shape, dispatches the packed projection through one lower_matmul_smoke GEMM_S8 tiled lowering, slices the packed accumulator into Q/K/V matrices, and applies host-side Q/K/V requantization
qkv_projection_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No fused attention kernel, fused RoPE, KV-cache update, multi-head layout scheduler, Android delegate, graph compiler, or production compiler backend is implemented

decode_attention_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 query tensor plus fixed-capacity rank-4 key/value caches, rank-4 new key/value tensors, and per-head cache lengths
decode_attention_lowering_smoke.lowering: Composes lower_kv_cache_update_smoke, host cache-view materialization with optional cache_window recent-token compaction and padded cache-lane mask, and lower_attention_smoke so the runtime appends K/V tokens and computes QK-softmax-AV attention over the updated cache
decode_attention_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No paged KV cache, hardware cache eviction, circular buffer, DMA-backed cache update, fused flash attention, multi-batch cache manager, Android delegate, graph compiler, or production transformer decode kernel is implemented

mlp_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates the two projection shapes, runs up-projection MACs through GEMM_S8, requantizes the hidden int32 accumulator to int8, runs activation through VRELU_S8, then runs down-projection MACs through GEMM_S8
mlp_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No GELU/SwiGLU inside lower_mlp_smoke, fused bias add, fused residual add, normalization, activation fusion, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

swiglu_lowering_smoke.lowering: Runs up-projection and gate-projection MACs through GEMM_S8, requantizes both hidden int32 accumulators to int8, dispatches elementwise gate products through scalar OP_MUL_LO, applies a fixed-point gate shift plus int8 saturation on host, then runs down-projection MACs through GEMM_S8
swiglu_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact SiLU/sigmoid, vector gate datapath, fused SwiGLU kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

swiglu_silu_gate_lowering_smoke.lowering: Runs up-projection and gate-projection MACs through GEMM_S8, requantizes both hidden int32 accumulators to int8, routes the gate tensor through lower_silu_smoke using EXP2_NEG_Q0_8, OP_SUB, and OP_MUL_LO scalar arithmetic, dispatches elementwise up*SiLU(gate) products through scalar OP_MUL_LO, applies a fixed-point gate shift plus int8 saturation on host, then runs down-projection MACs through GEMM_S8
swiglu_silu_gate_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact sigmoid, vector gate datapath, fused SwiGLU kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

silu_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates signed INT8 matrix inputs, dispatches every sigmoid decay approximation through EXP2_NEG_Q0_8, dispatches nonnegative sigmoid reconstruction through OP_SUB, dispatches every x*sigmoid product through OP_MUL_LO, and applies the final Q0.8 shift plus INT8 saturation on host
silu_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact sigmoid, exact SiLU, vector activation datapath, fused SwiGLU kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

gelu_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates signed INT8 matrix inputs, dispatches every 1.703125*x scale through OP_MUL_LO, dispatches every sigmoid decay approximation through EXP2_NEG_Q0_8, dispatches nonnegative sigmoid reconstruction through OP_SUB, dispatches every x*sigmoid product through OP_MUL_LO, and applies final Q0.8 shift plus INT8 saturation on host
gelu_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact erf/tanh GELU, exact sigmoid, vector activation datapath, fused MLP activation kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

bias_add_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates row-wise bias width, broadcasts the bias vector over input rows, dispatches each element through scalar OP_ADD, then interprets the signed int32 result and saturates to int8
bias_add_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector add opcode, fused bias path, arbitrary-rank broadcasting, normalization, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

residual_add_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates equal matrix shapes, then dispatches each element through scalar OP_ADD; host interprets the signed int32 result and saturates to int8
residual_add_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector add opcode, fused residual path, arbitrary broadcast add, normalization, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

transformer_block_lowering_smoke.lowering: Composes lower_attention_av_smoke, lower_bias_add_smoke, lower_residual_add_smoke, lower_mlp_smoke, and a second lower_residual_add_smoke for a batch-1 single-head block with prequantized attention weights
transformer_block_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No QK generation inside the block, softmax, scaling, masking, layer normalization, multi-head merge, KV-cache paging, fused kernels, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

modern_decoder_block_lowering_smoke.lowering: Composes lower_rmsnorm_smoke, either Q/K/V lower_matmul_smoke projections or one optional lower_qkv_projection_smoke packed-QKV projection with host Q/K/V slicing, host Q/K/V requantization, lower_rope_smoke, lower_attention_qk_smoke, host QK-score requantization, optional host-generated causal or sliding_window attention_mask_mode, lower_attention_softmax_smoke, host Q0.8 attention-weight requantization, lower_attention_av_smoke, lower_bias_add_smoke, lower_residual_add_smoke, a second lower_rmsnorm_smoke, lower_swiglu_smoke with optional SiLU-gated swiglu_activation, and a final lower_residual_add_smoke for a batch-1 single-head decoder block
modern_decoder_block_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact exp/e softmax, scaling fusion, multi-head merge, KV-cache paging/update, sliding-window sparse attention hardware, vector norm/RoPE/gate/softmax datapaths, fused kernels, Android delegate, graph compiler, or production compiler backend is implemented

rope_lowering_smoke.lowering: Dispatches every rotary-position embedding multiply, add, and subtract through scalar OP_MUL_LO, OP_SUB, and OP_ADD for even-width int8 matrices with prequantized int8 cosine/sine tables; host applies fixed-point shift and int8 saturation
rope_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector RoPE datapath, fused Q/K projection, KV-cache update, graph compiler, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

rmsnorm_lowering_smoke.lowering: Dispatches every RMSNorm square, sum accumulation, input-weight multiply, and reciprocal-RMS scale multiply through scalar OP_MUL_LO and OP_ADD for int8 matrices with int8 weights; host computes reciprocal RMS and applies fixed-point shift plus int8 saturation
rmsnorm_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector RMSNorm datapath, hardware reciprocal-square-root, fused transformer norm, graph compiler, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

descriptor_words: word0: opcode[3:0], stream_to_scratch[8], scratch_offset[21:16], byte_count[29:24], writeback_request[30], valid_owner[31]
word1: stream source byte address when stream_to_scratch is set; scalar OP_A otherwise
word2: scalar OP_B, or writeback destination byte address when writeback_request[30] is set for streamed GEMM
word3: scalar ACC or reserved for streamed GEMM

queue_depth_semantics.full_ring_encoding: not represented by the current 3-bit head/tail register interface

descriptor_queue_submission.implemented: Four-word descriptor fetch requires word0 valid_owner[31], advances a 3-bit head/tail ring only after accepted execution, launches existing scalar/GEMM datapath operations, optionally streams aligned descriptor-sourced DRAM words into the 64-byte scratchpad, counts read beats/bytes, supports aligned streamed GEMM output writeback through word2 when writeback_request[30] is set, counts write beats/bytes, rejects malformed or scalar writeback requests fail-closed, faults autonomously on descriptor timeout, and has userspace simulator evidence that staged descriptor memory is parsed for prepared-batch tensor streaming, GEMM execution, computed writeback, and read/writeback accounting
descriptor_queue_submission.not_claimed: This is a local RTL prototype path only; it is not an Android NNAPI, coherent IOMMU, production queue-depth, production DMA engine, vector writeback, scalar writeback, or phone-class accelerator proof

command_buffer_submission.staging: CommandBuffer.descriptor_image returns a deterministic word-addressed descriptor image and CommandBuffer.stage writes that image through a caller-provided 32-bit memory writer before submit arms the existing descriptor ring; stage_host_runtime_sequence validates GEMM preamble, descriptor submission, and completion_poll register metadata labels/addresses plus completion_poll requires_done_bit/rejects_error_bit metadata, replays a prepared-batch host_runtime_sequence through caller-provided MMIO and descriptor-memory writers, and returns eliza.e1_npu_host_runtime_sequence_stage_result.v1 without polling or executing; stage_prepared_descriptor_batch validates an eliza.e1_npu_prepared_descriptor_batch.v1 package, checks batch_index, arena_base, arena_total_bytes, arena_alignment_bytes, required_runtime_steps, descriptor_base, descriptor_memory_writes, descriptor_words stay within the RTL ring window, descriptor word0 valid_owner/stream_to_scratch/byte_count/scratch bounds, GEMM-only aligned writeback_request with nonzero GEMM_CFG output bytes, submission tail/head/base, op_names, and mmio_preamble_writes against descriptor_image/op_mmio_preamble metadata, and returns eliza.e1_npu_prepared_descriptor_batch_stage_result.v1; stage_prepared_descriptor_execution_batches validates eliza.e1_npu_prepared_descriptor_execution_batches.v1 packages, checks batch_index/execution_batch_index identity, arena_base consistency and arena sizing across the outer package, inner batches, and descriptor images, checks required_runtime_steps, checks descriptor_base plus execution_batch_index times descriptor_stride_bytes against each descriptor image and DESC_BASE submission write, checks descriptor_words stay within the RTL ring window and descriptor_memory_writes match descriptor_image, checks each descriptor word0 valid_owner bit, stream_to_scratch bit, positive aligned byte_count, scratch bounds, and GEMM-only aligned writeback_request with nonzero GEMM_CFG output bytes, checks descriptor image submission base/head/tail and submission_mmio_writes match descriptor_words count, checks descriptor image op_names match op_mmio_preamble, checks mmio_preamble_writes match op_mmio_preamble before staging, stages each ordered execution-batch host_runtime_sequence, and returns eliza.e1_npu_prepared_descriptor_execution_batches_stage_result.v1
command_buffer_submission.completion: Submit arms DESC_BASE/DESC_HEAD/DESC_TAIL once through submit_descriptors and waits for one descriptor completion proof for the staged batch
command_buffer_submission.not_claimed: No graph scheduler, dependency tracking, coherent IOMMU staging, production DMA allocator, Android delegate command stream, or queue-depth proof beyond the current 3-bit local RTL ring is implemented

partitioner_command_buffer_batches.emits: command_buffer_batches with op_names, runtime_apis, descriptor_slots, and command_buffer_max_entries
partitioner_command_buffer_batches.behavior: The partitioner walks StableHLO subset ops in order, starts a batch only for contiguous supported ops, splits supported runs at CommandBuffer.MAX_ENTRIES, and never batches across CPU fallback entries
partitioner_command_buffer_batches.not_claimed: No dependency scheduler, tensor lifetime allocator, memory planner, cross-fallback fusion, asynchronous queue ownership, Android delegate command stream, or production compiler backend is implemented

delegate_command_buffer_preprocess.emits: descriptor_specs plus command_buffer_batches copied from the shared partitioner report
delegate_command_buffer_preprocess.not_claimed: No native ExecuTorch backend, LiteRT shared library, Android NNAPI delegate, binary kernel codegen, tensor memory allocation, graph scheduling, or production runtime integration is implemented

delegate_tensor_arena_preprocess.emits: tensor_arena_plan with 4-byte aligned offsets, tensor names, roles, shapes, logical dtypes, storage_dtype, byte sizes, and total_bytes; descriptor-backed INT8/INT4 matmul result storage is sized as int32_accumulator for RTL GEMM writeback
delegate_tensor_arena_preprocess.not_claimed: No tensor lifetime reuse, alias analysis, DMA placement, cache-coherent allocator, Android AHardwareBuffer integration, or production memory planner is implemented

delegate_runtime_binding_preprocess.emits: runtime_binding_plan mapping lowering required_graph_fields and result tensors to tensor_arena_plan offsets, byte sizes, logical dtypes, storage_dtype, shapes, command_buffer_batch_index, descriptor_codegen_ready, ready_ops, blocked_ops, and unresolved_inputs for required fields without arena allocations
delegate_runtime_binding_preprocess.not_claimed: No binary descriptor codegen, DMA address assignment, tensor lifetime reuse, dependency scheduling, Android delegate integration, or production compiler backend is implemented

delegate_descriptor_staging_preprocess.emits: descriptor_staging_plan with descriptor opcode, input_stream_ready, writeback_ready, descriptor_codegen_ready, source_arena_offset, stream_byte_count, scratch_output_offset, required_output_bytes, output arena offsets, GEMM MMIO preamble values, relocatable descriptor_word_template, descriptor_words(arena_base) materialization helper, descriptor_batches with batch-level readiness and blocked_ops, descriptor_execution_batches split by shared_mmio_preamble for global GEMM registers, execution_command_buffer_image(arena_base, descriptor_base, execution_batch_index) materialization helper, delegate descriptor_command_buffer_image wrappers, delegate execution_command_buffer_image wrappers, LiteRT e1_litert_delegate_descriptor_command_buffer_image entry-point mirror, LiteRT e1_litert_delegate_execution_command_buffer_image entry-point mirror, command_buffer_image(arena_base, descriptor_base, batch_index) materialization helper with schema eliza.e1_npu_descriptor_command_buffer_image.v1 that fails closed for incompatible GEMM MMIO preambles, prepared_descriptor_batch(arena_base, descriptor_base, batch_index) materialization helper with schema eliza.e1_npu_prepared_descriptor_batch.v1, prepared_descriptor_execution_batch(arena_base, descriptor_base, execution_batch_index) materialization helper, prepared_descriptor_execution_batches(arena_base, descriptor_base, descriptor_stride_bytes) materialization helper with schema eliza.e1_npu_prepared_descriptor_execution_batches.v1 and fail-closed descriptor stride checks, host_runtime_sequence metadata with schema eliza.e1_npu_host_runtime_sequence.v1 for GEMM preamble writes, descriptor memory writes, descriptor submission MMIO writes, and DESC_STATUS completion poll conditions, delegate prepared_descriptor_batch wrappers, delegate prepared_descriptor_execution_batch wrappers, delegate prepared_descriptor_execution_batches wrappers, LiteRT e1_litert_delegate_prepared_descriptor_batch entry-point mirror, LiteRT e1_litert_delegate_prepared_descriptor_execution_batch entry-point mirror, LiteRT e1_litert_delegate_prepared_descriptor_execution_batches entry-point mirror, ready_ops, blocked_ops, and blocking_reasons
delegate_descriptor_staging_preprocess.not_claimed: No arena base address assignment, DMA runtime ownership, tensor data population, output dtype conversion, dependency scheduling, Android delegate integration, or production compiler backend is implemented

precision_matrix.path: DOT4_S8, RELU4_S8, VRELU_S8, and bounded GEMM_S8 through 64-byte MMIO scratchpad
DOT8_S4 packed dot, SDOT4_S4_2_4 sparse metadata dot, bounded sparse and group-scaled INT4 matmul lowering smoke, and bounded GEMM_S4 through 64-byte MMIO scratchpad; no compiler path
DOT16_S2 packed scalar dot prototype plus bounded scalar-dot INT2 matmul lowering smoke; no tensor INT2 GEMM/compiler path

DOT16_S2 with CMD_PARAM[1]=1 selects ternary {-1, 0, +1} lane decode (0b00=0, 0b01=+1, 0b10=-1); the reserved 0b11 encoding is rejected by the RTL through CTRL_STATUS.error and PERF_ERRORS. No tensor INT2 GEMM, BitNet compiler backend, or sustained TOPS evidence is implied
raw FP16 finite normal/zero matrices converted by host to signed Q8.8, then bounded scalar MUL_LO/ADD matmul lowering smoke; no tensor FP16 GEMM/compiler path
raw BF16 finite normal/zero matrices converted by host to signed Q8.8, then bounded scalar MUL_LO/ADD matmul lowering smoke; no tensor BF16 GEMM/compiler path
DOT4_FP8_E4M3 scalar E4M3 dot prototype plus bounded scalar-dot FP8 matmul lowering smoke with signed Q8.8 output only; no tensor FP8 GEMM/compiler path
OCP Microscaling MXFP8 (E5M2 or E4M3 lanes, 32-element block, shared E8M0 scale); no MX block-scaled operand fetch, no MX accumulator, and no compiler lowering exists today
precision_matrix.claim_boundary: no MX RTL or compiler support exists today; current DOT4_FP8_E4M3 is scalar evidence only and not the production format

precision_matrix.path: OCP Microscaling MXFP6 (E3M2 or E2M3 lanes, 32-element block, shared E8M0 scale); no MX block-scaled operand fetch, no MX accumulator, and no compiler lowering exists today
precision_matrix.claim_boundary: no MX RTL or compiler support exists today

precision_matrix.path: OCP Microscaling MXFP4 (E2M1 lanes, 32-element block, shared E8M0 scale); no MX block-scaled operand fetch, no MX accumulator, and no compiler lowering exists today
precision_matrix.claim_boundary: no MX RTL or compiler support exists today

precision_matrix.path: OCP Microscaling MXINT8 (INT8 lanes, 32-element block, shared E8M0 scale); no MX block-scaled operand fetch and no compiler lowering exists today
precision_matrix.claim_boundary: no MX RTL or compiler support exists today

precision_matrix.path: Bounded W4A8 group-scaled INT4 matmul smoke with signed Q8.8 per-group scales applied through scalar MUL_LO/ADD; no GEMM_S4_GS32/GEMM_S4_GS64/GEMM_S4_GS128 RTL opcode or compiler support exists today

opcodes_planned.claim_boundary: no RTL, compiler lowering, or runtime exists for any opcode below; these are spec-only entries that document the planned ABI shape and phase ownership

entries.name: GEMM_S4_GS32
entries.description: Group-scaled INT4 weight GEMM with group size 32 K lanes per shared scale
entries.weight_format: packed signed INT4 (two lanes per byte, low nibble first)
entries.scale_format: one INT8 or BF16 scale per 32 contiguous K lanes per output row
entries.activation_format: signed INT8 (BF16 once the tile carries BF16)
entries.accumulator: signed int32; host applies per-group scale during requantization

entries.name: GEMM_S4_GS64
entries.description: Group-scaled INT4 weight GEMM with group size 64 K lanes per shared scale
entries.weight_format: packed signed INT4 (two lanes per byte, low nibble first)
entries.scale_format: one INT8 or BF16 scale per 64 contiguous K lanes per output row
entries.activation_format: signed INT8 (BF16 once the tile carries BF16)
entries.accumulator: signed int32; host applies per-group scale during requantization

entries.name: GEMM_S4_GS128
entries.description: Group-scaled INT4 weight GEMM with group size 128 K lanes per shared scale
entries.weight_format: packed signed INT4 (two lanes per byte, low nibble first)
entries.scale_format: one INT8 or BF16 scale per 128 contiguous K lanes per output row
entries.activation_format: signed INT8 (BF16 once the tile carries BF16)
entries.accumulator: signed int32; host applies per-group scale during requantization

entries.name: GEMM_S4_2_4
entries.description: Tile-level 2:4 sparse INT4 GEMM; lift of the scalar SDOT4_S4_2_4 primitive to a parameterized tile op fed by a shared sparsity-decode microengine
entries.weight_format: packed signed INT4 with four nonzeros per eight-lane group; metadata carries two distinct 2-bit positions per four-lane half-group
entries.activation_format: dense signed INT4 or INT8 lanes consumed by the existing tile MAC array
entries.decode_path: shared sparsity-decode microengine expands 2:4 INT4 rows into dense lane input; no MAC array redesign

runtime_evidence_requirements: Runtime register constants match this manifest
BSP contract header exposes the same NPU perf offsets
Architecture documentation names each manifest perf counter
Descriptor queue registers expose only the local RTL 3-bit ring and must not be treated as production queue-depth or Android accelerator support
DMA tensor streaming evidence must include DESC_BYTES_READ and DESC_BYTES_WRITTEN from the measured NPU path when writeback_request[30] is used

Precision support beyond DOT4_S8, DOT8_S4, SDOT4_S4_2_4, DOT16_S2, DOT4_FP8_E4M3, FP16/BF16 scalar Q8.8 MUL_LO/ADD smoke paths, RELU4_S8, VRELU_S8, GEMM_S8, and GEMM_S4 must remain blocked until the precision matrix and runtime tests identify the measured path
Verilator GEMM smoke test checks unsupported_ops, cycles, macs, ops, and errors counters
Android HAL/NNAPI acceleration remains blocked without e1_npu_nnapi.proof.json plus VTS/CTS/SELinux evidence
Benchmark evidence must bind model hashes, transcript hashes, perf counters, DMA traces, and CPU fallback accounting

missing_for_phone_class: 160 dense INT8 peak TOPS target evidence
80 dense INT8 sustained TOPS target evidence
512 sparse INT4 peak TOPS target evidence
BF16, FP16, FP8 tensor execution beyond scalar Q8.8/E4M3 smoke paths, and INT2 tensor execution beyond scalar packed dot
AIDL HAL, VTS, CTS, and SELinux evidence
